summary: R2 systems_architect read-only review accepts M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001. Current HEAD is 25e49e6a7fb03b0e9a4ed98b24b8727d524e89a9, which is a route/task metadata checkpoint on top of the R2 implementation commit 3f6cdf760c258d575c7bd947399a77f013f137c1. The two prior P1 findings are fixed: M6 diplomacy/legitimacy commands now enforce actor authority and M6 AI uses the existing polity:<id> actor-id convention; recognized-order obligation decisions now distinguish clear/risk/blocked obligation state and risk/blocked prevents canPursueVictory with reason-coded pressure. Package boundaries, determinism, save/protocol compatibility, manual-node-battle deferral, and forbidden-path constraints remain acceptable.

tests_run.result: Current HEAD is 25e49e6a7fb03b0e9a4ed98b24b8727d524e89a9. This differs from the routed implementation review commit 3f6cdf760c258d575c7bd947399a77f013f137c1 because the R2 route checkpoint is now committed.
Only project route/task metadata changed after the R2 implementation commit: goal-mode state, GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION, R2 route evidence, model-routing state, active task JSON, and thread registry.
Branch changes are limited to allowed package/test/project message/task paths for this milestone: sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, tests, and process metadata.
No forbidden path modifications were found.
24 test files passed, 179 tests passed, including M6 unauthorized actor rejection and recognized-order clear/risk/blocked obligation coverage.
2 test files passed, 3 tests passed; M6 AI tests use actorId polity:2 and emitted AI commands keep actor kind ai with id polity:<actorPolityId>.
No selected package has a typecheck script; this is package-script absence, not a TypeScript diagnostic.
Node/worker-compatible hashes matched for hello, command/query, save/load, M4 replay, and M5 playable loop canaries.
ESLint passed over apps, packages, tests, tools, and project configs.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root Vitest passed 37 files / 259 tests; web Vitest passed 1 file / 4 tests.

tests_run.command: rg -n 'React|Pixi|Electron|node:fs|node:path|node:os|Math\.random|Date\.now|performance\.now|eval\(|new Function|import\(' packages\sim-core\src packages\sim-ai\src packages\protocol\src packages\save-format\src
tests_run.result: No sim/protocol/save source hits for forbidden UI/Electron/Node IO/time/random/dynamic-execution boundaries.

decisions: ACCEPT: the previous actor-authority P1 is fixed. sim.propose-diplomatic-agreement validates authority over proposerPolityId, sim.answer-diplomatic-agreement validates authority over the responding target polity, and sim.record-legitimacy-source is limited to explicit domain system actors.

ACCEPT: M6 AI actor parity is fixed. The M6 AI still uses command actor kind ai, but its actor id now follows the existing polity:<id> convention and passes through the same GameCommand submission path as player commands.

ACCEPT: the previous recognized-order obligation P1 is fixed. The tautological activeObligationCount >= 0 branch is gone; clear/risk/blocked are derived from actual M3 obligation status/accounting, and risk/blocked prevent canPursueVictory while emitting reason-coded pressure.

The implementation keeps M6 diplomacy/legitimacy state authoritative in sim-core with stable polity/character/agreement/source IDs, schemaVersion 1 state, canonical ordering, deterministic tie-breakers, and reason-coded command events/deltas.
Save/protocol changes remain additive/versioned. Save/load and protocol schema tests pass, including existing rejection coverage for malformed/missing/future-version payload paths.

No UI-only mutation, hidden AI privilege, hidden grand-strategy manager, implicit RPC, manual node battle, server/multiplayer, telemetry, arbitrary-code scripting, or full peace treaty UI was introduced.
No forbidden path modifications were found for PROJECT_STATUS.md, UI/desktop/content/tools/docs gate/roadmap/acceptance matrix areas.
risks: Current HEAD includes a committed R2 route checkpoint on top of the routed implementation commit, contrary to the route text expectation that the checkpoint was not yet committed; the delta is process metadata only and does not affect the package review.

The M6 legitimacy-source system actor allowlist is intentionally narrow for this milestone. Future domain integrations should add reviewed commands or authority rules rather than broadening it implicitly.
Untracked ui-samples/ remains in the worktree and was not inspected or modified because it is outside this read-only systems review scope.
requested_action: Accept R2 systems_architect review for M6-DIPLOMACY-LEGITIMACY-001 and proceed with the next orchestrator route. No required fixes remain from systems_architect review.
